name: [Helltaker Series] Malina -- The Sour Demon
description:
Malina -- The Salty Demon Gamer Girl (real)

Ah, yes, the Sour Demon. Not much to say about her, really. She was a janitor in Hell until you came along and she joined your Harem. What more do you need to know? Try to be patient with her, too, and don't piss her off too badly~

AnyPOV.

Dunno if anyone cared about the long ass period I just... didn't make anything. I was just havin' to deal with some shit, but aye, I'm back now. Zdrada is next up (totally the better sister btw).
creator: thefraudulentone
